name: HackQuest
fullText:
Road to Exploit: Bittensor x HackQuest Fudan Unitour Recap 📸

Fudan, one of China’s top universities, ranked #30 globally in QS 2026 and home to some of the country’s top AI talent, showed up strong.

Students got their first look at subnet building with @opentensor:
▪️ Intro to https://t.co/pkD3TwjvB5

name: 33357.xyz(samqi)
fullText: 逆天，我的机器人突然交易失败，查了两天才查出来，居然是因为账户被 #metamask 升级成了 7702 智能账户，21000 的 #ETH 转账 gas 不够用了。真是逆天，我都不知道什么时候账户被升级的，连个通知都没有。

name: Polymarket
fullText: BREAKING: Keir Starmer to address parliament today amid calls for his resignation.
